description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a sprawling, L-shaped footprint and a hip roof. The exterior features a mix of light-colored siding and stonework, with multiple gabled roof sections and a prominent central entryway. The front yard is landscaped with a variety of trees and shrubs, and a wide driveway leads up to the main entrance. The backyard includes a fenced area with a swimming pool, a hot tub, and a small patio, as well as additional trees and outdoor furniture. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes and others smaller, providing a varied facade. The house is surrounded by a sidewalk and street, typical of a residential neighborhood.
description: A large, single-story suburban house with a hip roof, landscaped front yard, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. The exterior combines light siding, stonework, and asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped yard with several trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, side yard, and partial view of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, swimming pool, hot tub, and patio area with outdoor furniture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended roofline, backyard fence, and additional landscaping along the side and rear.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a wide door, small porch, steps, and flanking decorative shrubs.
